# RoPE: Position Inside Attention {#sec-ch07-rope}

So far, position has been added to the token representation.
Sinusoidal and learned positional embeddings both create a position vector and add it to the token embedding before attention begins.

Modern GPT-style models often do something more subtle: they put position into attention itself.
That idea is called *Rotary Positional Encoding*, or *RoPE*.

{{< include book/07-rope/sections/idea.qmd >}}

{{< include book/07-rope/sections/math.qmd >}}

{{< include book/07-rope/sections/example.qmd >}}

{{< include book/07-rope/sections/code.qmd >}}

{{< include book/07-rope/sections/takeaways.qmd >}}
